actionUnits.condition: Building7 has an EventTrigger (MonoBehaviour id 300765817, script guid d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1). On EventTriggerType 4 (PointerClick), it invokes Commercial.showlabel on MonoBehaviour id 300765813 (script guid a8e394fec5558d54daa16e3fcb3cc7d3). This MonoBehaviour maps to the provided 'Commercial' script and will set Player child[1] TextMeshPro text to the first 20 characters of 'Commercial:Totoro Theater'.

Building7 has EventTrigger (MonoBehaviour id 300765817, script guid d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) configured for eventID 4 (PointerClick) to call Commercial.showlabel on MonoBehaviour id 300765813 (script guid a8e394fec5558d54daa16e3fcb3cc7d3), which matches the provided Commercial script. This will set Player child[1] TextMeshPro text to the first 20 characters of GetLabel() => 'Commercial:Totoro Theater' for Building7.
